summary: iOS | Free 60 artwork missing, and update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest not working (Studio iOS or PTT)
scenario: Poly Voyager Free 60+ artwork missing and firmware update fails from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) via Poly Studio Mobile iOS app or PTT
description_clean: On iOS, the Poly Voyager Free 60+ artwork is missing, and firmware update from version v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to the latest fails via the Poly Studio Mobile iOS app or PTT.
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS
Locate the Poly Voyager Free 60+ device card
Observe the device artwork/icon displayed on the card
Tap on the device name to enter Device Settings
Navigate to Device Settings → Firmware Update
Check current firmware version (should be v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5))
Attempt to update firmware to the latest version via the app
Alternatively, attempt firmware update via Poly PTT (Plantronics Technician Tool) on iOS
expected: Device artwork for Poly Voyager Free 60+ is displayed correctly on the Home screen. Firmware update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to the latest version completes successfully via the Poly Studio Mobile iOS app or PTT.
actual: Device artwork for Poly Voyager Free 60+ is missing on the Home screen. Firmware update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to the latest version fails via both the Poly Studio Mobile iOS app and PTT.
